<html>
<head><script async src="https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-1252989978389601"
     crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
	<title>Thy_Ghy</title>
	<style type="text/css">body {
        background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, 
          black, 
          grey, 
          grey, 
          grey, 
          black
        );
        background-size: 100% 100px;
        background-repeat: repeat-y;
        animation: animateBackground 20s linear infinite;
        text-align: center;
        padding: 0;
      }
      @keyframes animateBackground {
        0% {
          background-position: 0% 0%;
        }
        100% {
          background-position: 0% 100%;
        }
      }
      .navbar {
        background-color: #333333;
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 20px;
        box-shadow: 5px 5px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3), 
                    -5px -5px 10px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
        width: 100%;
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
      }
      .navbar a {
        font-size: 20px;
        color: white;
        font-weight: normal;
        text-shadow: 0 0 5px darkgrey, 0 0 10px darkgrey, 0 0 15px darkgrey;
        text-decoration: none;
        margin-right: 20px;
        position: relative;
        padding: 0 10px;
        margin-left: 10px;
      }
      .navbar a:after {
        content: "";
        display: block;
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        right: 0;
        width: 1px;
        height: 90%;
        background-color: white;
      }
      .navbar a:last-child:after {
        display: none;
      }
      .centerblock {
        background-color: #333333;
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 20px;
        box-shadow: 5px 5px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3), 
                    -5px -5px 10px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
        display: inline-block;
        transform: translate(0, -5px);
        width: auto;
        position: absolute;
        top: 50%;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      }
      h1 {
        font-size: 50px;
        color: white;
        text-shadow: 0 0 5px darkgrey, 0 0 10px darkgrey, 0 0 15px darkgrey;
      }
      h2 {
        font-size: 30px;
        color: white;
        font-weight: normal;
        text-shadow: 0 0 5px darkgrey, 0 0 10px darkgrey, 0 0 15px darkgrey;
      }
      h3 {
        font-size: 20px;
        color: white;
        font-weight: normal;
        text-shadow: 0 0 5px darkgrey, 0 0 10px darkgrey, 0 0 15px darkgrey;
      }
	</style>
</head>
<body>
<p class="c6"><span class="c0">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></p>

<h1 class="c6"><span style="font-size:48px;"><em><a href="http://thy-ghy.itch.io/" onclick="window.open(this.href, 'Itch', 'resizable=yes,status=no,location=no,toolbar=no,menubar=no,fullscreen=no,scrollbars=no,dependent=no'); return false;"><span style="color:#FFF0F5;"><span style="background-color:#000000;">My Itch.io</span></span></a><span style="background-color:#000000;"><span style="color:#FFF0F5;"> | </span><a href="http://www.upwork.com/freelancers/~0104272701e9ae5c5f"><span style="color:#FFF0F5;">My Upwork Profile</span></a><span style="color:#FFF0F5;"> | </span><a href="https://forms.gle/W16sQJ74S38m5Q796"><span style="color:#FFF0F5;">Contact Me</span></a></span></em></span></h1>

<br />
<br />

<img alt="" height="495" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," width="371" /><br />
<br />
<br />
&nbsp;
<h1><span style="font-size:36px;"><em><strong><u>About Me</u></strong></em></span></h1>

<h3><span style="font-size:20px;"><span style="color:#FFF0F5;">Hello! My name is Maurion, and I&#39;m a high school senior with about 5 years of Experience with Unreal Engine 4/5. My interest in the game development industry was initially sparked by my love of gaming and my desire to make my own games. At first, took a journey into Unity and C#, and was able to make a few games while using it. Most of them were for Game jams, but If you&#39;re interested in seeing them, you can find them here on itch.io. Some more things you should know about me, Is in my earlier High-school years I took Computer Science. I have about 2 years of experience with Java and 1 year with JavaScript. So overall, Im a very technical person, it fascinates me!</span> Im always looking forward to meeting new people and finding new job opportunies!</span><br />
&nbsp;</h3>

<h1><u><strong><em><span style="font-size:36px;">Example Projects</span></em></strong></u><br />
<span style="font-size:20px;">Space Simulation, with mostly acurate orbits</span></h1>
<img alt="" height="422" src="data:image/png;base64,
